title: Overworld - End Sea [Create Aeronautics]
description: This project adds an Aeronautics End Sea to the Overworld
body:
This is a rather simple datapack that adds the End Sea from [Create Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics) to the Overworld, making it so that, in case you are playing on some sort of Sky Island world gen or some other purpose, your Contraptions would not just eternally fall into the void.


```
{
  "dimension": "minecraft:overworld",
  "priority": 1,
  "start_y": -40,
  "depth_gradient": 1.0,
  "drag": 1.0
}
```
